channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the reg…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the region on Wednesday in response to the U.S. maritime blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4fBaEKz
item.content:encoded: Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the region on Wednesday in response to the U.S. maritime blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4fBaEKz

item.title: Dr. Erica Schwartz, Trump's nominee for CDC director, faces …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz, Trump's nominee for CDC director, faces the Senate health committee for her confirmation hearing on July 15. If confirmed, she will lead an agency dealing with workforce and leadership shortages, and new layers of political review. n.pr/4gEscGS
item.content:encoded: Dr. Erica Schwartz, Trump's nominee for CDC director, faces the Senate health committee for her confirmation hearing on July 15. If confirmed, she will lead an agency dealing with workforce and leadership shortages, and new layers of political review. n.pr/4gEscGS

item.title: When Solitaire Miles was 18, she had a stroke. When she got …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: When Solitaire Miles was 18, she had a stroke. When she got to the hospital, doctors and nurses accused her of being on drugs. Then, her unsung hero arrived and ensured she got the care she needed. n.pr/4gF8sms
item.content:encoded: When Solitaire Miles was 18, she had a stroke. When she got to the hospital, doctors and nurses accused her of being on drugs. Then, her unsung hero arrived and ensured she got the care she needed. n.pr/4gF8sms

item.title: Dani Bensky and a group of women who were abused by Jeffrey …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Dani Bensky and a group of women who were abused by Jeffrey Epstein have formed a bond they call a "survivor sisterhood." They live in two worlds, of advocacy and everyday life and motherhood. n.pr/4vXradE
item.content:encoded: Dani Bensky and a group of women who were abused by Jeffrey Epstein have formed a bond they call a "survivor sisterhood." They live in two worlds, of advocacy and everyday life and motherhood. n.pr/4vXradE

item.title: Napalm Death's ongoing campaign for musical destruction come…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Napalm Death's ongoing campaign for musical destruction comes to the Desk. The founding fathers of grindcore speed through a sprawling catalog with manic energy. n.pr/4gFtMYT
item.content:encoded: Napalm Death's ongoing campaign for musical destruction comes to the Desk. The founding fathers of grindcore speed through a sprawling catalog with manic energy. n.pr/4gFtMYT

item.title: A Tyrannosaurus rex fossil billed as one of the world's larg…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A Tyrannosaurus rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest and most complete specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million Tuesday to a mystery bidder. n.pr/4vXlfFs
item.content:encoded: A Tyrannosaurus rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest and most complete specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million Tuesday to a mystery bidder. n.pr/4vXlfFs

item.title: NCT 127、メンバー7人全員で再契約 https://natalie.mu/music/news/680954?u…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
NCT 127、メンバー7人全員で再契約
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680954?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

SMが公式発表「これまで築いてきた堅固なチームワークと当社との深い信頼を基に、全員が再契約を締結したことをお知らせいたします」
item.content:encoded:

item.description: The speech comes as President Trump has escalated calls for Republicans to pass tighter federal voting rules for November's midterm elections. n.pr/4aPBBYj

item.title: Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerg…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track. n.pr/4wOryvb
item.content:encoded: Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track. n.pr/4wOryvb
